name: Banana Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add banana, eggs, and vanilla to the mixture. Stir in dry ingredients one at a time.
3. Alternately add buttermilk and mix well.
4. Fold in chopped nuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured loaf pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
